title: Aomig Steaming Basket for Cooking, Stainless Steel Vegetable Steamer Basket, Expandable 5.6" to 9", Metal Folding Steamer Insert for Veggie, Fish, Seafood Cooking, Silver
features: High-Quality Materials: Crafted from high-quality 430 stainless steel, this stainless steel vegetable steamer basket ensures rust-free durability and heat resistance. It’s dishwasher and microwave safe, with three sturdy legs that keep food elevated above water for perfect steaming results

Easy and Safe: The vegetable steamer basket features a flexible rim for quick size adjustment and a removable handle for effortless placement in deep pots. Safely lift your food from boiling water using a fork, keeping hands protected from steam and heat during use

Multiple Functions: More than just a Steaming Basket for Cooking, this versatile tool doubles as a strainer and fruit basket. Ideal for home cooks and professionals, the folding steamer unlocks healthier meal options while maximizing kitchen efficiency

Expandable and Collapsible: This folding steamer conveniently collapses to 5.6 inches for compact storage and expands to 9 inches, adapting to various pots, pans, and pressure cookers. Transform any cookware into an instant steamer with this space-saving vegetable steamer basket

Healthier Cooking: Steam with confidence knowing this stainless steel vegetable steamer retains over 90% of nutrients often lost in other methods. Perfect for vegetables, seafood, eggs, meats, rice, and baby food—supporting a nutritious diet effortlessly
description: Features: 1. An awesome gift for your family and friends. 2. It steamed the vegetables well and is a very handy addition to your kitchen. 3. The steaming basket for cooking can expand and adjust to fit various size pots and pans. 4. It's great to store away after use as folds down compactly and doesn't take up any cupboard space. 5. The stainless steel vegetable steamer comes supplied with a lifting hook and is made from stainless steel. 6. It's a clever design and opens like a flower and creates a bowl shape and can be opened further into a flat style plate. 7. Versatile steamer, except breads, hamburger and corn, also can put fruits, vegetables and seafood into the foldable steamer. Just steam all kinds of food into it as you like. Specification: Material: 430 Stainless Steel Package Content: 1 x Vegetable Steamer Basket Warm Tips: Because the product uses a special polishing process, it needs to be washed with hot water before first use to ensure that it is clean.
